certification_basis: The AiGOL CLI exposes approval list/show/pending/approved/rejected/chain commands.
The command group recognizes proposal approval and improvement approval artifacts.
Replay wrapper hashes and approval artifact hashes are validated before display.
Canonical chain continuity is preserved where approval artifacts include canonical_chain_id.
Corrupt approval replay fails closed in operator-visible output.
The command group does not dispatch, invoke, execute, mutate governance, mutate replay, create execution requests, or bypass approval runtimes.
known_limitations: The command group is inspection and visibility oriented; it does not yet record new approval decisions.
Older proposal approval artifacts without canonical_chain_id remain visible but cannot be included in chain-specific filtering unless future evidence supplies canonical chain identity.
